recommended_value: Primary ACT1 infliximab UC dataset row. GSE23597 contains 48 ACT1 patients and 113 colonic biopsy arrays across baseline, week 8, and week 30; baseline patient/timepoint labels overlap the ACT1 subset represented by GSE12251.
ACT1 placebo-controlled infliximab UC expression substudy; primary ACT1 family row for cohort counting. Contains longitudinal baseline, week 8, and week 30 biopsy arrays.

ACT1 source verification complete for cohort-family assignment. GEO GSE23597 and PMID 21448149 support 48 ACT1 UC patients and 113 biopsies across baseline/week 8/week 30; same ACT1 patient/timepoint labels show GSE12251 is a baseline subset/component.

Component/baseline ACT1 subset of DS106. GSE12251 contains 22 ACT1 patients and 23 pre-infliximab baseline arrays, with patient/timepoint labels matching baseline ACT1 samples in GSE23597; do not count independently from DS106.
ACT1 baseline pre-infliximab subset; overlaps DS106 by patient/timepoint labels and should be retained only as a component/accession-specific row.

ACT1 source verification complete for overlap assignment. GEO GSE12251 lists 22 ACT1 patients and 23 baseline arrays, with IDs matching baseline ACT1 samples in GSE23597; mark component_of_dataset_id=DS106 and count_as_independent_cohort=FALSE.

Distinct Leuven/KULeuven infliximab UC cohort from the same Gut 2009 publication family as GSE12251. GEO lists 24 active UC patients plus 6 controls with Leuven-style sample labels; no source evidence of subject/sample overlap with ACT1/GSE23597.
Leuven/KULeuven infliximab UC cohort from Gut 2009 two-cohort study; treat as distinct from ACT1 rows unless future source-level review shows otherwise.

Source verification supports distinct Leuven cohort assignment. GEO GSE14580 and PMID 19700435 describe 24 active UC patients plus 6 controls from KULeuven/TARGID Leuven; same Gut 2009 publication family as DS062 but no evidence of ACT1 sample overlap.
